_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in architecting compensating security controls to reduce risk for control systems and control system components that do not have adequate or compliant security capabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.591), RM-S-006 (RM, cosine: 0.559).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.418). Shared vocabulary: [control, security, skill, systems]. DCWF-only terms [adequate, architecting, capabilities, compensating, compliant, components] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, gap] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.877, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Skill in architecting compensating security controls to reduce risk for control" and "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.638 > STS 0.418 (gap +0.220). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [control, security, skill, systems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.6%. Shared tokens: [control, security, skill, systems]. DCWF-only: [adequate, architecting, capabilities, compensating, compliant, components]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, gap].

signals.detail: STS 0.418 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.220 with low STS 0.418. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
